name: prelim-approved-broker-package
rationale: Clean intake + admin reply approving the prelim review. F2.PA prelim_approved_at timestamp set; F4.BP broker-package composer fires; broker receives formatted lender package email with attachments (composeBrokerLenderPackageEmail). Tests the post-prelim broker-package handoff flow.
notes: Two-event sequence: intake + admin approval reply. Phase 4 assertion-shape note: F2.PA gate firing + F4.BP package content shape are TWO distinct assertions.
